name: MessageToast

unions.name: MessageToast
unions.comment: MessageToast holds the collection of messages.

values.name: danger
values.type: MessageToast.MessageToast msg -> ( MessageToast.ToastMessage msg, MessageToast.MessageToast msg )

values.name: getOldestToast
values.comment: Provides the time-wise oldest message toast that is still shown.

values.name: info
values.type: MessageToast.MessageToast msg -> ( MessageToast.ToastMessage msg, MessageToast.MessageToast msg )

values.name: init
values.comment:
Initializes the messageToast handler with the default settings.

    - Delay: 8 seconds
    - Showing messages: 4
    - Styling: default

values.name: initWithConfig
values.comment: Initializes a custom messageToast handler with the provided options.
values.type: (MessageToast.MessageToast msg -> msg) -> { delayInMs : Basics.Float, toastsToShow : Basics.Int } -> MessageToast.MessageToast msg

values.name: overwriteContainerAttributes
values.comment:
Overwrite existing styles for the message toast container that contains all the several toasts displayed.

For example, this can be used to override the position or width of the toasts.
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> MessageToast.MessageToast msg -> MessageToast.MessageToast msg

values.name: overwriteIconAttributes
values.comment:
Overwrite existing styles for the message toast icon that's placed inside the toast container besides the message block.

For example, this can be used to override colors, spacings or sizes of the icon.
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> MessageToast.MessageToast msg -> MessageToast.MessageToast msg

values.name: overwriteMessageAttributes
values.comment:
Overwrite existing styles for the message toast message block that's placed inside the toast container besides the icon.

For example, this can be used to override colors, spacings, font attributes or alignments of the toast message.
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> MessageToast.MessageToast msg -> MessageToast.MessageToast msg

values.name: overwriteToastAttributes
values.comment:
Override existing styles for the message toast that wraps the icon and message block.

For example, can be used to ovveride border stylings, shadows or spacings between the toasts.
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> MessageToast.MessageToast msg -> MessageToast.MessageToast msg

values.name: popOldestToast
values.comment: Removes the time-wise oldest toast from the existing collection.

values.name: subscriptions
values.comment: Subscription to automatically remove the oldest toast that is still displayed.

values.name: success
values.type: MessageToast.MessageToast msg -> ( MessageToast.ToastMessage msg, MessageToast.MessageToast msg )

values.name: warning
values.type: MessageToast.MessageToast msg -> ( MessageToast.ToastMessage msg, MessageToast.MessageToast msg )

values.name: withHtml
values.comment: Displays a generated MessageToast content with a given user-defined layout.
values.type: Html.Html msg -> ( MessageToast.ToastMessage msg, MessageToast.MessageToast msg ) -> MessageToast.MessageToast msg

values.name: withMessage
values.comment: Displays a generated MessageToast content with a given message in the default layout.
values.type: String.String -> ( MessageToast.ToastMessage msg, MessageToast.MessageToast msg ) -> MessageToast.MessageToast msg
